phrasal_verbs.meaning: button/zip up a piece of clothing
put on (a piece of clothing) to see how it looks and if it fits

F.title: Word formation
F.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

questions.sentence: The young ...... showed her paintings in a local gallery. (ART)

This shirt doesn't ...... me — it's too tight.
